rules.before_edit: Read all other agents' state files. If target repo-relative path exactly matches another agent's locked_files entry, BLOCK. Basename-only entries are legacy fallback only.
rules.on_session_start: Write own authoritative state file with status=active, current_task, next_step, locked_files=[]; then sync derived artifacts.
rules.on_session_end: Write own authoritative state file with status=idle, current_task='', next_step='', locked_files=[]; then sync derived artifacts.
